description_long: A disorganized pile of cardboard parcels and packages is shown, with various box sizes stacked and scattered. Some boxes are open, revealing rolled-up papers or documents inside, while others are closed and sealed with tape. Several flat sheets, possibly packing slips or documents, are spread around the base of the pile. The cardboard surfaces are worn and slightly dirty, with visible creases, tape, and shipping labels. The overall appearance suggests these parcels have been handled and possibly left in a storage or delivery area. The color palette is dominated by brown and beige tones typical of cardboard, with some white from the papers and labels.
description: A messy pile of cardboard parcels, some open with rolled papers and scattered documents, showing signs of wear and shipping labels.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open boxes with visible rolled papers and a spread of documents on the ground in front.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central open box and the vertical rolled paper are prominent, with more boxes visible in the background.
description_view_2: The rear of the pile is shown, with the largest box and more closed parcels, and fewer visible documents.
description_view_3: This view displays the back and side of the pile, with multiple closed boxes and a wide spread of documents on the ground.
